title: Aurora SMP Mod
description: This is a mod is similar to the infuse smp mod, it removes effects on death, and give effects on kills!
body:
This is my first **EVER** mod!

This mod introduces the main feature of when you die, you get a negative potion effect, and when you kill, you get a positive effect! When you get 6 deaths, you get banned (Constantly killed), it also adds upgrade, and downgrade items, reccomended to be played with JEI (Just enough recipes) to see all new, recipes. Also, the gapple recipe was changed, and added recipes for blaze rods, enchanted golden apples, and cobwebs.

This mod is a great mod for smp's wanting a cool idea. A fun survival world wanting a cool lives system. Minigames revolving around kills, and deaths!

**Known Bugs**
- First Death not working
- Sometimes ban doesn't work
- Fifth Kill giving, then removing all effects
